settings.title: Free Cuts for Anyone Donating a Ponytail
settings.excerpt: Grow it out, give it to wigmakers for kids, and the haircut afterward is on us.
settings.body:
For the whole month, Shearline is teaming up with a charity that turns donated hair into wigs for children who have lost their own.

For a child going through illness, a wig made from real hair can restore a little of the normality that gets stripped away. The hair for those wigs has to come from somewhere, and it can come from you.

How it works

If you are ready for a big change and your hair is long enough to donate, the cut is free. We will bundle and send your ponytail off ourselves, so there is nothing for you to post or arrange.

What you need to know before you come in:

  • Hair generally needs to be around twelve inches to be usable.
  • Clean, dry, uncolored hair is ideal, though we can advise on yours.
  • We tie it off before cutting, so the length stays intact for the charity.

Help us beat fifteen

Last time we ran this we sent fifteen ponytails. We would love to beat that, so if you have been thinking about going short, this is your sign.

It is a rare thing, a haircut that helps someone else as much as it freshens you up. Book any time this month and tell us you are donating.
